objectif:
General engineer with a double degree, specialized in embedded systems and information technologies.
My goal is to design, develop, and deploy innovative solutions in artificial intelligence and embedded systems (drone, smartphone, robot...).

posts.title: Embedded Software Engineer
posts.description: Development of an internal eSIM (eUICC) management solution with automation and monitoring of IoT operations.

posts.title: Systems Engineer
posts.description: Creation of a Python tool automating modem firmware updates with detection and graphical interface.

posts.title: Systems Engineer
posts.description: Development of an embedded system for real-time data collection and monitoring for an autonomous vehicle.

posts.title: Embedded Software Engineer
posts.description: Development of automated testing tools to evaluate performance and behavior of autonomous delivery robots.

posts.title: Production Worker
posts.description: Participation in the assembly line at the welding section of the Poissy plant, installing parts on industrial robots.

projects.title: Cardiac MRI Segmentation (ACDC Challenge)
projects.description: Development of U-Net models to automatically segment cardiac MRIs (ventricles and myocardium) using semi-supervised Mean Teacher learning to improve diagnostic accuracy.

projects.title: Virtual Reality Bowling Game
projects.description: Development of an immersive VR bowling environment using Meta Quest 3 to analyze the impact of VR training on real-world performance.

projects.title: Customer Churn Prediction
projects.description: Machine Learning model to predict customer churn in telecommunications and deployment via PowerApps using Azure ML.

projects.title: Student Dropout Prediction AI
projects.description: AI system to predict student dropout risk using student data, Flask API, and cloud deployment.

projects.title: Object Detection and Depth Estimation
projects.description: Computer vision pipeline combining YOLOv8 and monocular depth estimation to analyze a scene from a single image.

projects.title: Raspberry Pi Cluster – Traffic Simulation
projects.description: Creation of a Raspberry Pi cluster simulating a coordinated traffic light network using distributed communication.

projects.title: Donkey Kong Game on PIC Microcontroller
projects.description: Development of an embedded 2D game on a PIC microcontroller with LCD display, interrupts, and EEPROM storage.

projects.title: RFID Student Card Recognition System
projects.description: Complete RFID card reading system with PCB, microcontroller, Java interface, and database for access management.

projects.title: Recruitment Management Application (Java)
projects.description: Object-oriented Java application to manage job offers, applications, and interactions between recruiters and candidates.

projects.title: Airport Database Management System
projects.description: Airport management system using MySQL and a C# application to manage flights, passengers, baggage, and staff.

projects.title: ECE CUP – Arduino Remote-Controlled Car
projects.description: Design and programming of an Arduino-based remote-controlled car interacting with its environment via a BLINK mobile app.

projects.title: Smart Home with Arduino
projects.description: Design of a smart home prototype controlled by Arduino to automatically manage lighting, energy consumption, and window opening. An LCD1602 displays sensor data.
